mapper.select: SELECT * FROM staff_statistics ORDER BY rating_avg DESC, completed_count DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO staff_statistics (staff_id, service_count, completed_count, rating_sum, rating_avg) VALUES (#{staffId}, 0, 0, 0, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE staff_statistics SET service_count = COALESCE(service_count, 0) + 1, completed_count = COALESCE(completed_count, 0) + 1, rating_sum = COALESCE(rating_sum, 0) + #{rating}, rating_avg = (COALESCE(rating_sum, 0) + #{rating}) * 1.0 / (COALESCE(completed_count, 0) + 1) WHERE staff_id = #{staffId}
UPDATE staff_statistics SET service_count = COALESCE(service_count, 0) + 1, completed_count = COALESCE(completed_count, 0) + 1 WHERE staff_id = #{staffId}

UPDATE staff_statistics s SET s.completed_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointment WHERE staff_id = s.staff_id AND status = 3 ), s.service_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointment WHERE staff_id = s.staff_id AND status IN (1,2,3) ), s.rating_sum = ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(sc.rating), 0) FROM appointment a JOIN service_comment sc ON a.id = sc.appointment_id WHERE a.staff_id = s.staff_id ), s.rating_avg = ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(sc.rating), 0) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) FROM appointment a JOIN service_comment sc ON a.id = sc.appointment_id WHERE a.staff_id = s.staff_id )
